description: Karaite prenuptial agreement executed at the time of the betrothal between Nissim Levi b. Moshe and Rahma d. Avraham. Dated Sunday 17th Kislev 5509 AM (1748 CE). In the event that he breaks the conditions of the agreement, the prospective groom commits to give a quarter qinṭār of (olive?) oil to the Dār Simḥa Synagogue in Cairo. Signed and witnessed by the scribe Eliyahu Rofe aka Ṣaʿīr.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
